description: Layer 3 eval: tracks AI agent performance per task across sessions

schema.iterations: number of back-and-forths until correct (1 = correct on first attempt)
schema.regressions: list of regressions introduced (empty if none)
schema.over_engineered: true if solution added unrequested features/abstractions

tasks.description: Fix PDF button triggering print dialog instead of file download
tasks.notes: Used html2pdf.js CDN. Correct on first attempt.

tasks.description: Fix LLM time extraction: 'de 6a a tarde ate domingo a tarde' planned until Sunday night
tasks.notes: Added last_day_end_time + first_day_start_time to LLM schema, UserPreferences, DayPlanner, and main_system.

tasks.description: setup_rag2.py failing: UnicodeEncodeError with emojis in print statements on Windows cp1252
tasks.notes: Root cause: emojis in Python scripts. Should never have been there. Also had ChromaDB NotFoundError after delete_collection — fixed with client.reset(). Three iterations to resolve both issues.

tasks.description: Fix map labels: all POIs showing D1->D1->D1 instead of A1->A2->A3
tasks.notes: Single-line fix in map_generator.py: chr(64+day_num) converts 1->A, 2->B, etc.

tasks.description: Remove fitness/algorithm/total travel time from UI metrics strip; show budget per person and total group
Exclude 'eventos' category (270 POIs) from all RAG queries via $nin filter
tasks.notes: Added category_exclude parameter to rag_setup.py; passed EXCLUDED_CATEGORIES constant to all 4 RAG query calls in main_system.py.

tasks.description: Save user IP per run in runs_log.csv and run JSON
tasks.notes: Added Request to FastAPI /query endpoint; user_ip field added to log_to_hf.py.

tasks.description: Replace Haversine fallback with static travel time lookup table per mode and distance bracket
Rewrite check_poi_descriptions.py to classify descriptions by content (schedule, cost, general) using regex
tasks.notes: Free and instant vs Groq API approach.
